tags.name: Overview
tags.description:
🔐 Security Configuration API

This API provides centralized management of **AES encryption** and **JWT configuration**. ---

🔑 AES Configuration

Manage AES encryption settings used by the system. ### Capabilities - ✅ Create AES configuration - ✅ Update AES configuration - ✅ Delete AES configuration - ✅ Retrieve all AES configurations - ✅ Retrieve AES configuration names ---

🪪 JWT Configuration

Manage JWT authentication and token settings. ### Capabilities - ✅ Create JWT configuration - ✅ Update JWT configuration - ✅ Delete JWT configuration - ✅ Retrieve all JWT configurations - ✅ Retrieve JWT configuration names ---

AESID.description:
ID of AES Key
Auto generate by API

InputAESKey.description:
Input Key from User (Password)
Get from Front-end and encrypted with Library then store in EncryptedAESKey

EncryptedAESKey.description:
Encrypted AES Key Generated by Common library
Get from InputAESKey and encrypted with Library then store in EncryptedAESKey

RSAPrivateKey.description:
Private Key File Generated by Common library
Auto generate by Common library

Cby.description:
Create By
Auto generate by API (KeyCloak)

Cdate.description:
Create Date
Auto generate by API

Uby.description:
Update By
Auto generate by API (KeyCloak)

Udate.description:
Update Date
Auto generate by API

jwtsecretid.description:
ID of JWT Secret key
Auto generate by API

secretkey.description: Secret of JWT Secret (Encrypted Master Key)

tokenid.description:
ID of JWT Token ID
Auto generate by API

projectid.description:
Project ID
Auto generate by API

id.description:
ID of Application
Auto generate by API

public.application.id.description:
Type string <= 34 characters
Example: id=Value
Reference from reposity for identify application
Mandatory. ```json { "id": "e751354c-ab88-415c-8200-fd0e83826baf" } ```

Sconfig.description:
Type string <= 50 characters
Example: Sconfig=Value
Source of Config, there are option will load from database or CDN
Mandatory. ```json { "Sconfig": "CDN" } ```

ConfigPath.description:
Type string <= 500 characters
Example: ConfigPath=Value
name of table or server path
Mandatory. ```json { "ConfigPath": "T1-C2E1-CN1/Auto/Shared" } ```
